'''鈭歜-b-zh-ng''' ('''kababzhengoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:flagship|flagship]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-b-zh-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:flagship|flagship]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-b-zh-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kababzhengoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibabzhengoko|thibabzhengoko]] || [[word:jibabzhengoko|jibabzhengoko]] || [[word:shibabzhengoko|shibabzhengoko]] || [[word:kibabzhengoko|kibabzhengoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
